content: Only swarm_runtime is allowed and no read/file_path call exists.
The handler sends literal /skill:swarm text via pi.sendUserMessage in both persisted-control and launch paths.
readSchema requires path; file_path is not a provider-facing property.
Literal /skill text plus disabled expansion necessarily leaves Skill loading to the model; the observed [skill] read call matches the renderer's SKILL.md classification.
